properties.name: Al Ruwais THAAD Battery
properties.description: THAAD battery west of Abu Dhabi. Satellite imagery (CNN, Mar 5) confirmed strikes on 3 buildings including AN/TPY-2 radar shelter. Coordinates from OSINT: 24°03'44.47"N, 52°43'03.23"E

properties.name: Al Sader THAAD Battery
properties.description: THAAD battery near Abu Dhabi. Satellite imagery showed damage to southern part of facility between Feb 28 - Mar 1. Houses AN/TPY-2 radar and launchers.

properties.name: Al Dhafra THAAD / Patriot Complex
properties.description: Co-located THAAD and Patriot batteries at Al Dhafra Air Base. Primary defence hub for Abu Dhabi. First real-world THAAD intercept was here in Jan 2022 vs Houthi missile.

properties.name: Abu Dhabi Patriot Battery 1
properties.description: Patriot PAC-3 battery protecting Abu Dhabi city centre and government district. UAE operates several PAC-3 batteries around the capital.

properties.name: Abu Dhabi Patriot Battery 2
properties.description: Second Patriot battery covering eastern Abu Dhabi / Saadiyat / Yas Island corridor.

properties.name: Jebel Ali Patriot Battery
properties.description: Patriot battery at Jebel Ali port/free zone. GlobalSecurity.org confirms UAE placed one battery here to protect the critical port infrastructure.

properties.name: Dubai / Northern Emirates Patriot Battery
properties.description: Patriot battery covering Dubai. Exact location classified but GlobalSecurity.org indicates one battery in the northern emirates, presumably Dubai area.

properties.name: Abu Dhabi Pantsir-S1 Battery
properties.description: Russian-supplied Pantsir-S1 mobile air defence system. UAE purchased 50 units in 2000. Rapid-fire cannons + short-range missiles for counter-drone/low-altitude threats.

properties.name: Al Minhad Pantsir-S1
properties.description: Point defence at Al Minhad Air Base protecting UK/Australian assets.

properties.name: Ruwais Refinery Point Defence
properties.description: Point defence protecting ADNOC Ruwais refinery complex. Despite this, a drone strike hit the facility causing a fire and forcing shutdown of 922k barrels/day.

properties.name: Camp de la Paix Air Defence
properties.description: French Rafale jets deployed for base defence following strikes. Camp de la Paix near Zayed Port was struck by drones.

properties.name: Al Dhafra AN/TPY-2 Early Warning Radar
properties.description: AN/TPY-2 forward-based radar at Al Dhafra. Provides early warning detection of missile launches hundreds of km away. Part of integrated Gulf early warning network.
